_description: 1800 queries for evaluating STREAM's complexity judge. 6 domains x 100 per class x 3 classes. Pre-labeled by Claude Sonnet, manually verified. Used by benchmark_routing.py.

_labeling_criteria.LOW: Single-fact lookups, definitions, basic arithmetic, greetings. A 3B model suffices. Domain vocabulary does not determine complexity — 'What is vLLM?' is LOW because a one-sentence definition suffices.
_labeling_criteria.MEDIUM: Explanations, code generation, multi-step reasoning, comparisons. Needs a capable 7B-72B model.
_labeling_criteria.HIGH: Formal derivations, system design, research-level analysis, mathematical proofs. Benefits from frontier models.

_labeling_method: Pre-labeled by Claude Sonnet followed by manual verification. Borderline cases defaulted to the cheaper tier.
